null_expectations.note: Expected exceedance fractions if the climate matched the 1991-2020 baseline. Counts above these are the anomaly signal; counts near them are the base rate.

validation.note: Searched Chandigarh late-July 2024 heat; no date-specific corroboration found.

A subagent proposed 'contradicted' from May-2024 being rainless with 46°C peak heat, but the flag is a cool NIGHT: our data has 2 May 2024 at min 15.5°C / max 33.4°C / 0mm — a clear dry night, not rain-cooled, and consistent with a pre-heatwave airmass. No direct evidence on the night min itself, so recorded as no-public-record rather than contradicted.
